title: **New Integration** Monday <> Coda

posts.author: ScottWeir (Scott Weir)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

My name is Scott and our team primarily works with Coda. But recently we worked with a large enterprise that uses both Monday and Coda.

In order to make working with both platforms easier, our team developed a publicly available integration between Monday<>Coda.

image1176×325 37.8 KB

The integration is a two-way sync and it allows you to sync all of your boards, items, and sub-items into a coda document.

What this means is any items and updates to any items will appear in Coda. And then users in Coda can actually update all that data inside coda and all edits there will appear instantly in Monday as well!

Other use cases that we’ve seen with this integration:

  • Using Codas advanced charting and dash boarding capabilities to make interactive dashboards from Monday data.
  • Using Codas extensive integration network to trigger automations off your monday data.
  • Just having cross-functional teams be able to view the same data in multiple platforms.

Here’s a quick getting started guide if you want to learn more!

Coda – 11 Jan 25

Getting Started with Monday<>Coda

Use this document for everything you need to get started with the Monday pack for Coda

Let me know if you have any questions! Hoping people in this community might have a use for it
